layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the market — patience beats FOMO right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory with a score of 25/100, and that fear is getting worse, not better. Most altcoins are in clear downtrends with charts showing strong selling pressure. While a few coins like LDO have popped recently, they've already run up 22% in a week and are risky to chase. The safest play right now is to wait for a clearer bottom signal before putting money to work.
layman_action: Stay in cash and watch. The market is showing heavy selling pressure across the board. Wait for fear to stabilize or reverse before entering any new positions. A better buying opportunity is likely coming.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate fails to present a compelling risk/reward setup right now. BONK has an RSI of 31 (our most reliable signal at 80% win rate), but the chart is strongly bearish (-2.0 bias) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — catching this knife could mean another 20%+ down. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but RSI at 59 after a 22% weekly move and 52% 5-day momentum means it's already extended — the risk/reward to resistance is only 0.38x, which is terrible. ETH is the most defensible watchlist pick with RSI approaching oversold (39) and institutional-grade liquidity, but it's below all MAs with a -0.70 chart bias. BTC dominance at 56.4% signals capital is fleeing alts into Bitcoin, making altcoin trades especially risky. With Fear & Greed at 25 and worsening, the macro backdrop favors patience over action.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear at 25 and worsening — markets can stay irrational and dump further before any bounce materializes
BTC dominance at 56.4% actively punishing altcoin positions — capital rotation into BTC may continue
No candidates show volume confirmation or MACD bullish crosses — technical momentum is absent across the board
watch_list: BONK RSI dipping below 25 with a bullish reversal candle (hammer/morning star) — would signal true oversold bounce setup
ETH holding $1,800 support and Fear & Greed index stabilizing or turning upward from 25
FTX $900M creditor distribution impact on market — could create temporary selling pressure or provide post-distribution relief rally
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with the trend worsening. BTC is holding near $63,900 with 56.4% dominance, signaling a risk-off rotation where altcoins underperform — not the environment to force swing trades.
context_banner: Extreme Fear and rising BTC dominance create a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades — capital preservation is the priority.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 with a worsening trend — historically this either precedes a capitulation bottom (too early to tell) or continued sell-off. No contrarian buy trigger yet.
BONK RSI at 31 and ETH at 39 are approaching oversold territory, but neither has confirmed a reversal pattern — our 80% win rate on RSI trades requires waiting for confirmation.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors in its fifth payment round could inject liquidity back into the market — worth monitoring as a potential catalyst in coming days.
'ETH derivatives reset' article suggests leveraged positioning has unwound, which could set the stage for a cleaner move once direction is established.
LDO shows Three White Soldiers (+0.85 chart bias) but already extended at +52% in 5 days with 0.38x R:R ratio. BONK shows Three Black Crows (-2.0 bias) — both extremes argue against entry right now.
